task_description:
为无畏契约(Valorant)战绩分析网页设计一个完整的主页UI设计图(PNG格式)。

设计要求：
- 整体风格：现代、科技感、暗色主题（黑色/深灰色背景）
- 配色：红色/金色高亮 + 白色文字（Valorant 品牌色）

主页布局包含：
1. 顶部导航栏：Logo("战绩分析")、菜单(首页/统计/排位/设置)、玩家昵称
2. 玩家信息卡（大卡片）：昵称、等级、当前排位分(2500分)
3. 核心统计区：总场数(156)、胜率(62.3%)、K/D/A(1.2/0.8/3.5)、平均评分(285)
4. 最近5场比赛列表：显示地图、对阵结果、得分、时间
5. 英雄出场统计：显示3-5个常用角色的出场率和胜率柱状图
6. 排位趋势折线图：近15天的分数变化曲线
7. 页脚：copyright信息

输出：保存为 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png，像素宽度 1440px，设计精美专业

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import math

# 创建画布 - 1440px宽，自动计算高度
width = 1440
height = 2200
image = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 深蓝黑背景
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(image)

# 定义颜色
BG_PRIMARY = '#0a0e27'
BG_SECONDARY = '#16213e'
ACCENT_RED = '#ff4655'  # Valorant红
ACCENT_GOLD = '#f0ad4e'  # 金色高亮
TEXT_PRIMARY = '#ffffff'
TEXT_SECONDARY = '#b0b8c1'
DIVIDER = '#2d4059'

# 尝试加载系统字体，如果失败使用默认
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 32)
    font_subtitle = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 24)
    font_body = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 18)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 14)
    font_nav = ImageFont.truetype('/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc', 16)
except:
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_subtitle = font_title
    font_body = font_title
    font_small = font_title
    font_nav = font_title

y_offset = 0

# 1. 顶部导航栏 (高度 70px)
navbar_height = 70
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, navbar_height)], fill='#0d1117')
draw.line([(0, navbar_height), (width, navbar_height)], fill=DIVIDER, width=2)

# Logo
draw.text((40, 20), '战绩分析', fill=ACCENT_RED, font=font_subtitle)

# 菜单
menu_items = ['首页', '统计', '排位', '设置']
menu_x = 400
for item in menu_items:
    draw.text((menu_x, 26), item, fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_nav)
    menu_x += 100

# 玩家昵称
draw.text((width - 200, 26), '玩家昵称: Shadow', fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_nav)

y_offset = navbar_height + 30

# 2. 玩家信息卡（大卡片）
card_y = y_offset
card_height = 200
draw.rectangle([(30, card_y), (width - 30, card_y + card_height)], 
               outline=ACCENT_RED, width=2, fill=BG_SECONDARY)

# 卡片内容
draw.text((60, card_y + 30), '玩家昵称', fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
draw.text((60, card_y + 55), 'Shadow#CN1', fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_subtitle)

draw.text((420, card_y + 30), '当前等级', fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
draw.text((420, card_y + 55), 'GOLD 2', fill=ACCENT_GOLD, font=font_subtitle)

draw.text((750, card_y + 30), '排位分数', fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
draw.text((750, card_y + 55), '2500', fill=ACCENT_RED, font=font_subtitle)

draw.text((1050, card_y + 30), '排名', fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
draw.text((1050, card_y + 55), 'Top 25%', fill=ACCENT_GOLD, font=font_subtitle)

y_offset = card_y + card_height + 40

# 3. 核心统计区
stats_y = y_offset
stats_box_width = (width - 100) // 4
stats_boxes = [
    {'label': '总场数', 'value': '156'},
    {'label': '胜率', 'value': '62.3%'},
    {'label': '平均K/D', 'value': '1.2'},
    {'label': '平均评分', 'value': '285'}
]

for i, stat in enumerate(stats_boxes):
    box_x = 30 + i * (stats_box_width + 10)
    draw.rectangle([(box_x, stats_y), (box_x + stats_box_width, stats_y + 120)],
                   outline=ACCENT_RED, width=1, fill=BG_SECONDARY)
    draw.text((box_x + 20, stats_y + 20), stat['label'], fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
    draw.text((box_x + 20, stats_y + 55), stat['value'], fill=ACCENT_RED, font=font_title)

y_offset = stats_y + 140

# 4. 最近5场比赛列表
matches_y = y_offset
draw.text((40, matches_y), '最近5场比赛', fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_subtitle)
matches_y += 50

matches = [
    {'map': '分裂', 'result': '胜', 'score': '13-8', 'time': '昨天 14:30'},
    {'map': '冰晶', 'result': '胜', 'score': '13-7', 'time': '3天前'},
    {'map': '灵境', 'result': '负', 'score': '9-13', 'time': '5天前'},
    {'map': '港湾', 'result': '胜', 'score': '13-10', 'time': '7天前'},
    {'map': '绞刑架', 'result': '胜', 'score': '13-9', 'time': '9天前'},
]

for match in matches:
    draw.rectangle([(40, matches_y), (width - 40, matches_y + 50)],
                   outline=DIVIDER, width=1, fill=BG_SECONDARY)
    draw.text((60, matches_y + 12), match['map'], fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_body)
    
    result_color = ACCENT_RED if match['result'] == '胜' else TEXT_SECONDARY
    draw.text((300, matches_y + 12), match['result'], fill=result_color, font=font_body)
    draw.text((450, matches_y + 12), match['score'], fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_body)
    draw.text((width - 250, matches_y + 12), match['time'], fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_body)
    
    matches_y += 60

y_offset = matches_y + 20

# 5. 英雄出场统计
heroes_y = y_offset
draw.text((40, heroes_y), '常用角色', fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_subtitle)
heroes_y += 50

heroes = [
    {'name': '景昭', 'rate': 85},
    {'name': '金牌', 'rate': 72},
    {'name': '防卫', 'rate': 65},
    {'name': '雾夜', 'rate': 55},
]

hero_width = (width - 100) // 4
for i, hero in enumerate(heroes):
    hero_x = 40 + i * (hero_width + 10)
    # 英雄背景框
    draw.rectangle([(hero_x, heroes_y), (hero_x + hero_width, heroes_y + 140)],
                   outline=ACCENT_GOLD, width=1, fill=BG_SECONDARY)
    # 名字
    draw.text((hero_x + 15, heroes_y + 15), hero['name'], fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_body)
    # 出场率文本
    draw.text((hero_x + 15, heroes_y + 50), '出场率', fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
    draw.text((hero_x + 15, heroes_y + 75), f"{hero['rate']}%", fill=ACCENT_GOLD, font=font_subtitle)
    # 简单进度条
    bar_width = hero_width - 30
    bar_filled = int((bar_width * hero['rate']) / 100)
    draw.rectangle([(hero_x + 15, heroes_y + 110), (hero_x + 15 + bar_width, heroes_y + 125)],
                   fill=DIVIDER)
    draw.rectangle([(hero_x + 15, heroes_y + 110), (hero_x + 15 + bar_filled, heroes_y + 125)],
                   fill=ACCENT_RED)

y_offset = heroes_y + 160

# 6. 排位趋势折线图
trend_y = y_offset
draw.text((40, trend_y), '近15天排位趋势', fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_subtitle)
trend_y += 50

# 绘制图表背景
trend_height = 200
draw.rectangle([(40, trend_y), (width - 40, trend_y + trend_height)],
               outline=DIVIDER, width=1, fill=BG_SECONDARY)

# 模拟数据点
data_points = [2300, 2350, 2320, 2450, 2400, 2500, 2480, 2520, 2550, 2600, 2580, 2650, 2700, 2680, 2750]
min_val = min(data_points)
max_val = max(data_points)
data_range = max_val - min_val if max_val > min_val else 1

plot_width = width - 100
plot_height = trend_height - 40
plot_x_start = 50
plot_y_start = trend_y + trend_height - 30

points = []
for i, val in enumerate(data_points):
    x = plot_x_start + (i / (len(data_points) - 1)) * plot_width
    y = plot_y_start - ((val - min_val) / data_range) * plot_height
    points.append((x, y))

# 绘制折线
for i in range(len(points) - 1):
    draw.line([(points[i][0], points[i][1]), (points[i+1][0], points[i+1][1])],
              fill=ACCENT_RED, width=3)
    # 数据点
    r = 4
    draw.ellipse([(points[i][0]-r, points[i][1]-r), (points[i][0]+r, points[i][1]+r)],
                 fill=ACCENT_GOLD)

y_offset = trend_y + trend_height + 40

# 7. 页脚
footer_y = height - 60
draw.rectangle([(0, footer_y), (width, height)], fill='#0d1117')
draw.line([(0, footer_y), (width, footer_y)], fill=DIVIDER, width=2)
draw.text((40, footer_y + 20), '© 2025 Valorant战绩分析平台 | 所有数据来自官方API',
          fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)

# 保存文件
image.save('/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png')
print('✓ Valorant UI设计图已生成: /Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png')
print(f'✓ 尺寸: {width}x{height}px')
print('✓ 设计包含: 导航栏、玩家信息卡、统计区、比赛列表、英雄统计、趋势图、页脚')
